channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Furniture and other stuff dumped on our estate again, 24th July
item.description:
Consistently used as a fly tipping spot

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edwards Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: HGV Trailer dumped here in January 2026, 24th July
item.description:
HGV Trailer was dumped here in January 2026 & reported to Greenwich Council at the time who have done nothing about it since. It needs to be removed URGENTLY. It already appears to have been hit several times by other vehicles and is causing a hazard.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herringham Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car with advertising on it., 24th July
item.description:
Car has not moved for over a year and has broken bodywork with flat tyres.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Above Flat 24, Canterbury Court, 24th July
item.description:
The over flow pipe on our level of flat 24 or on the balcony above flat 24 the drain leaks into our flat below every time it rains

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle abandoned in privately owned parking space. Owner unknown. Multiple notes left, 24th July
item.description:
This vehicle has been abandoned in a privately owned car parking space belonging to Flat 7 Freeland Court. Attempts to locate the owners have been unsuccessful and notes have been left on the vehicle for some time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandhurst Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 24th July
item.description:
Dead fox on the verge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Honor Oak Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin and rubbish left around and on top of bin, 24th July
item.description:
This has been here for a couple of days attracting vermin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside the entrance to St James Church sherriff road, nw6 2ap, 24th July
item.description:
There is a big hole on the pavement, several people have fell over and tripped over this

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Sherriff Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streatley Road Pocket Park, 24th July
item.description:
Dumped furniture and household items

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Bin chutes blocked, 24th July
item.description:
Bin chutes completed blocked ,, don’t understand why people have to chuck wood and carpet down bin chutes,, fire waiting to happen needs clearing asap ,, obviously cleaner didn’t come or check this morning!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two huge trees that creak in high winds and are dangerous, 24th July
item.description:
We have made Bromley aware of this problem on numerous occasions. The two trees are huge and require urgent pruning for safety reasons as children play in this area
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ullswater Close, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter being left in wooded area, 24th July
item.description:
Some young males in their 20s have been hanging out in this area and they are leaving a lot of litter. It's getting worse by the day.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Calverley Close, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ten huge restaurant size yogurt containers (roughly the size of a very large plastic paint pot), 24th July
item.description:
Ten full Yoghurt containers have been dumped. These require removal please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tent Peg Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 24th July
item.description:
Discarded chairs, sofa cushions, paint tins and other rubbish fly tipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pendas Mead, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stolen Street sign?, 24th July
item.description:
Missing for 2 months, needs to be sorted.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Crescent, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, glass and other sharp items on public walk way, 24th July
item.description:
Bins overflowing. Litter, glass, used sanitary pads, dirty nappies and sharp objects over public walk way. Leaving it impossible to pass through.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Streamway, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 24th July
item.description:
Usual continuing problem with discarded rubbish. When is this issue going to be resolved?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Streamway, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked outside neighbours house., 24th July
item.description:
Been parked in road for a month. Untaxed. Left and been unattended for a month
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Verdun Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Squatters have occupied commercial premises, 24th July
item.description:
Squatters have broken into and occupied the commercial premises at 55-61 Tabernacle Street, London, EC2A 4AA.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56 - 64, Leonard Street, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tp sprayed., 24th July
item.description:
Sprayed TP need cleaning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longhope Close, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
